description: Local Windows development preset for running the moos kernel with the file-backed store by default.
notes: Reference preset for local Windows workstation development. Not for production use.
This preset launches the kernel against the local JSONL morphism log by default and does not require database credentials.
If you switch MOOS_KERNEL_STORE to postgres, provide MOOS_DB_PASSWORD through secrets/api_keys.env so MOOS_DATABASE_URL can be resolved at runtime.
Set MOOS_KERNEL_STORE=postgres to persist the morphism log into Postgres instead of the local JSONL file.
The semantic registry is derived from the canonical knowledge-base ontology at MOOS_KERNEL_REGISTRY_PATH and constrains allowed kinds, strata, and port link forms.
Port values are compatibility-preserved. Do not change them without an explicit recorded decision.
Bootstrap behavior for this preset is defined in platform/windows/installers/README.md.
The Go fallback command runs from the nested module root at platform/kernel.
